creator: curtis.rendon@gmail.com
text:
>Is this still a problem with modern versions of FreeBSD?
 
 Yes. I can get dvdrw to work correctly with burncd...
 
 details:
 
 uname -a
 FreeBSD igor 6.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE #0: Fri Jan 12 08:43:30 UTC 
 2007    root@portnoy.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/SMP  amd64
 
 
 mkisofs  -R -J -iso-level 3 -no-bak -r $1 | burncd -f /dev/acd0  -s max 
 -e  -m data - fixate
 .
 .
 .
   99.99% done, estimate finish Sun Jul  8 19:28:05 2007
 Total translation table size: 0otal 4250168 KB
 Total rockridge attributes bytes: 806
 Total directory bytes: 0
 Path table size(bytes): 10
 Max brk space used c108488 KB total 4250488 KB
 2125279 extents written (4150 MB)
 written this track 4250558 KB total 4250558 KB
 fixating CD, please wait..
 burncd: ioctl(CDRIOCFIXATE): Input/output error
 
 dmesg:
 g_vfs_done():acd0[READ(offset=692224, length=65536)]error = 5
 acd0: FAILURE - CLOSE_TRACK/SESSION ILLEGAL REQUEST asc=0x72 ascq=0x03
 
 
 atacontrol cap acd0
 
 Protocol              ATA/ATAPI revision 7
 device model          Optiarc DVD RW AD-7530A
 serial number         30644920 1322114Q111
 firmware revision     EH31
 cylinders             0
 heads                 0
 sectors/track         0
 lba supported
 lba48 not supported
 dma supported
 overlap not supported
 
 
 -- 
 Those that judge you for being a geek also think Paris Hilton is 
 interesting.
                                                 ---CWR
